dcc:name.dcc:content: Dr. J. Pauli/ Dr. U. Resch-Genger

drmd:description.dcc:content: The fluorescence quantum yield standard BAM-F013 is supplied as a solid in a tightly closed glass bottle). The Standard Operation Procedure (SOP) based on the publication of C. Wuerth et al. in Nature Protocols 20132 that describes the correct use of CRM BAM-F013 is included. An open access version of the revised and finally submitted manuscript and supporting information approved by Nature Protocols can be found under https://nbn-resolving.org/urn:nbn:de:kobv:b43-294202. *)The bottle containing BAM-F013 and the box used as package have labels with different BAM logos as BAM meanwhile changed its logo.

a) Ethanolic dye solution of BAM-F013, which shows an absorbance at the excitation wavelength A(λex) between 0.10 and 0.12. b) BAM-F013 dissolved in absolute ethanol is certified for use as fluorescence quantum yield standard for the relative determination of the fluorescence quantum yield (Φf) and for controlling and validating the performance of integrating sphere-based fluorescence instruments for the absolute determination of Φf at T = (22°+ 2) °C. c) Estimated expanded uncertainty U with a coverage factor of k = 2 corresponding to a level of confidence of approx. 95 %, as defined in the Guide to the expression of uncertainty.¹

drmd:intendedUse.dcc:content: BAM-F013 dissolved in absolute ethanol is certified for use as a Φf standard for the relative determination of the fluorescence quantum yields of transparent luminophore solutions using excitation wavelengths between 690 nm and 795 nm (excitation within the dye's longest wavelength absorption band). BAM-F013 can be also employed for controlling and validating the performance of integrating sphere-based fluorescence instruments for the absolute determination of Φf.

drmd:storageInformation.dcc:content: BAM-F013 can be shipped at room temperature. After receipt, the CRM must be stored in a refrigerator at 2 - 8 °C. Under these conditions, it will preserve its certified properties for 24 months after delivery. When preparing the measurement solution, care must be taken to avoid moisture uptake. The ethanolic solution of BAM-F013 must be stored in the dark at 2 – 8 °C in a tightly closed container to prevent water uptake. Stock solutions of this dye with typical absorbances at the absorbance maximum of 2 can be stored under these conditions for 2 weeks in the dark at 2 – 8 °C. Dilute solutions with an absorbance at the maximum of 0.3 or less should be disposed after use. BAM is not responsible for changes in the certified properties that occur during storage of the material at the customer's premises, especially not in the case of opened vials and prepared dye solutions.

drmd:instructionsForHandlingAndUse.dcc:content: Please follow the instructions given in the Standard Operation Procedure (SOP) provided with the material.

drmd:metrologicalTraceability.dcc:content: The certified fluorescence quantum yield Φf value of CRM BAM-F013 was determined with a calibrated custom-made integrating sphere setup. The calibration of the wavelength-dependent spectral responsivity of the integrating sphere setup was performed with the certified spectral radiance standard 10W BN-9701 (SDS, serial number 973372-02) calibrated by PTB Berlin in the wavelength region from 280 nm to 1750 nm (Calibration Certificate No. 73114 PTB 17;Oct. 2017), and with the deuterium lamp LSB 215 (D2, serial number H61685) from LOT Quantum Design GmbH, calibrated by Heraeus Noblelight GmbH for the wavelength range from 200 nm to 400 nm (Test report No. 21966_2). The spectral responsivity s(λ) of the integrating sphere-detector ensemble was obtained by dividing the measured signals Īraw (λ)by the certified spectral radiance (Wm-³sr¯¹ ) of the SDS or deuterium lamp ZRS(λ) (see equation [4]), which are traceable to the International System of Units (SI).

drmd:referenceToCertificationReport.dcc:content: A detailed technical report describing the analysis procedures and the treatment of the analytical data used to certify BAM-F013 is available upon request.

drmd:legalNotice.dcc:content: Neither BAM, its contractors, nor any person acting on their behalf: (a) Make any warranty or representation, express or implied, that the use of any information, material, apparatus, method or process disclosed in this document does not infringe any privately-owned intellectual property rights; or (b) Assume any liability with respect to, or for damages resulting from the use of any information, material, apparatus, method, or process disclosed in this document save for loss or damage arising solely and directly from the negligence of BAM.

drmd:digitalReferenceMaterialDocument.drmd:comment: For additional information please refer to the pdf certificate
